title: Suspension of Embarkation, Disembarkation, Crew Change, and
content: 31 Shore Leaves. Notwithstanding the provisions of the preceding section, in pursuit of 32 national interest or when public welfare so requires, the Department may simultaneously 33 impose suspension on the embarkation, disembarkation, crew change, and/or shore 34 leaves of Filipino seafarers in countries/jurisdictions where a ban on the deployment of 35 OFWs or a Crisis Alert Level is imposed by the Department, after consultation with the 36 DFA. 37 38 As a matter of policy, the Department acknowledges the right of a seafarer to offshore 39 leaves, subject to rules, regulations, and measures of the port state. 40 41
